creator: stant@bestyle.ru
text: I also stumbled on this issue. I have maxproc=32 in /etc/login.conf, but it's ignored by jobs running from crontab. I think this is critical vulnabirity, because unpriveleged user may abuse whole system via crontab jobs. Documentation doesn't say anything about it (see https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/security-resourcelimits.html#resource-limits).
